site.indexTitle: aidemo blog — product demo videos, automated
site.indexDescription: Practical, evidence-backed writing on product demo videos — scripting, recording, automating, and keeping them fresh — from the team behind aidemo, the open-source demo engine for coding agents.
site.hubDescriptionTemplate: Articles about {topic} from the aidemo project.
site.feedDescription: Practical, evidence-backed writing on product demo videos and demo automation.
site.llmsDescription: Practical, evidence-backed articles on product demo videos — scripting, recording, automation, AI tooling, and demos-as-code — from the team behind aidemo, the open-source engine that turns an agent-authored storyboard into a narrated, captioned demo video.
site.editorialPolicyDescription: How aidemo blog articles are researched, written, reviewed, and corrected — evidence standards, AI-assistance disclosure, and how to file corrections.

brand.name: aidemo
brand.aiDisclosure: This article was researched and drafted with AI assistance and reviewed by the aidemo maintainers. Tool capabilities and prices change — check vendor docs before deciding.
